title: Supervisor Worker Assignment System
objective: Preview how a supervisor turns one work goal into assigned workers, packet previews, lanes, validators, approval gates, and next safe actions.
allowed_actions: inspect existing supervisor, bootstrap, work packet, lane, validator, approval, and commit package files
preview worker roles and packet metadata
detect required lanes from file scope
preview commit and PR packaging without staging or publishing
risks: worker assignment could be mistaken for permission to launch workers
validator PASS could be mistaken for APPLY approval
commit or PR package preview could be mistaken for permission to stage, commit, push, or open a PR
trading-related paths must remain paper-only and must not enable broker or live execution
stop_condition: Stop after the supervisor assignment preview, validators, git status, approval requirement, and next safe action are reported.
notes: No active queue mutation is allowed without separate approval.
No worker or Codex auto-launch is allowed.
Commit and PR packaging is preview-only.
